expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs get command (not search) to fetch the specific issue
expectations.evidence: Uses raw curl commands against the REST API directly (curl -s -u ... /rest/api/3/issue/DO-123), not jira.mjs get.

expectations.text: References DO-123 as the issue key in the command
expectations.evidence: Multiple references to DO-123 throughout, e.g. 'GET https://wnesolutions.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/DO-123?fields=status,assignee,priority'

expectations.text: Mentions presenting status, assignee, and priority fields to the user
expectations.evidence: Step 3/4: 'Status: .fields.status.name ... Assignee: .fields.assignee.displayName ... Priority: .fields.priority.name' and shows formatted output with all three fields.
